response.overview: As the world changes, traditional arts slowly disappear from the public's memory. Sapardi (54), once a revered master of Remo Boletan dance from Jombang, East Java, has watched his fame fade, leaving him to work as a rice farmer. When his only son, Raka (12), who is deaf, discovers the beauty of the dance, an unexpected journey begins—one that rekindles Sapardi's faith in his lifelong passion and inspires a community to rediscover the cultural heritage they had nearly forgotten.
response.title: ANANTA
